# registerGetACoffeeModule()

```ts
function registerGetACoffeeModule(server: McpServer, repo: CoffeeRepository): void;
```

Defined in: [coffee/get-a-coffee/module/get-a-coffee.module.ts:24](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/1df9da293b0f83cbdcf2bdd1886c4a53f0e3e2c8/src/app/coffee/get-a-coffee/module/get-a-coffee.module.ts#L24)

Wires the get-a-coffee module-service chain and registers the MCP tool.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                                                                                        | Description                             |
| --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | `McpServer`                                                                                                 | The MCP server to register the tool on. |
| `repo`    | [`CoffeeRepository`](../../../../shared/repository/coffee/coffee.repository/interfaces/CoffeeRepository.md) | The coffee repository for data access.  |

## Returns

`void`

## Remarks

Creates the service and controller instances with dependency injection,
then delegates tool registration to [registerGetACoffeeTool](../../../tool/get-a-coffee.tool/functions/registerGetACoffeeTool.md).
Wiring order: repository → [GetACoffeeService](../../../service/get-a-coffee.service/classes/GetACoffeeService.md) →
[GetACoffeeController](../../../controller/get-a-coffee.controller/classes/GetACoffeeController.md) → tool.
